items.title: Liverpool owners face dilemma - stick or twist with Slot?
items.summary: Liverpool owners FSG face a dilemma as they consider whether to react to growing fan dissent against Arne Slot, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Hirving 'Chucky' Lozano Excluded From Mexico's Preliminary World Cup Roster
items.summary: Mexico manager Javier Aguirre has released his 55-man preliminary World Cup roster, notably excluding Hirving "Chucky" Lozano.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: GT go No. 1 after Rabada and Holder rout SRH
items.summary: GT sealed their biggest win and handed SRH their biggest defeat
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
